# Topline Plumbing

> Fast, reliable plumbing in Redding, CA and surrounding areas.

## Business Information

- **Company**: Topline Plumbing
- **Phone**: (530) 768-9446
- **Email**: Toplineplumbingredding@gmail.com
- **Website**: https://toplineplumbingco.com
- **Location**: Redding, CA 96001
- **Service Area**: Redding, Shasta Lake, Anderson, Palo Cedro, Bella Vista, and surrounding Northern California communities
- **Hours**: Mon–Fri 8am–5pm | 24/7 Emergency Service
- **License**: Licensed, Bonded & Insured — California

## Services

### Emergency Plumbing (24/7)
- Burst pipe repair
- Active leak response
- Flooding and water damage mitigation
- Gas line emergencies

### Water Heater Services
- Water heater repair (all makes/models)
- Water heater replacement
- Tankless water heater installation
- Same-day service available

### Drain & Sewer
- Drain cleaning
- Clogged toilet repair
- Sewer line clearing
- Power auger service

### General Plumbing
- Leak detection and repair
- Pipe repair and replacement (PEX & Copper)
- Fixture installation (sinks, toilets, faucets, showers)
- Residential plumbing service

## Key Differentiators

- Upfront pricing before work begins — no hidden fees
- Same-day service available for most repairs
- Licensed, insured technicians
- Real person answers 24/7 — no voicemail
- 100% satisfaction guarantee

## Contact

- **Phone**: (530) 768-9446
- **Email**: Toplineplumbingredding@gmail.com
- **Book Online**: https://toplineplumbingco.com/contact

## Website Structure

- `/` — Homepage
- `/services` — Full service listing
- `/areas` — Service area pages
- `/about` — About the company
- `/gallery` — Work portfolio
- `/contact` — Contact form and booking
